a l t
h 톝 t 툺 r
칮 y h k n i 콂 k
p a n r 톩 n틣
p r a i틣 t 톩 s v a k p 톩
p r a i틣 칧 a
p r a u틣 t
p 톩 r퍈 c a
p 톩 칧 c
p a i틣 t a
p o u틣 s a
t a r k a
t r e i틣
t o u틣 m
톝틣 v
e i n k 칮 y 콂 k
톝 p l a
톝 p n a
e i n f a l t 톩
e i틣 j a f j a t l a j 콉틣 k 툺 t l
f a p l a
f a i l n 톩 s
f 톩 n t p a n t
f j o u틣 r 톩 r
f 톖틣 r 톝 l t 톩
f 툺 t l퍈 k퉗 톖 m 툺 r
f 톩 s t 톩 r
f a r
f a r a
f a r r 톩
k a u틣 k 톩 n틣 톩
k a틣 r a r
k a u틣
c 톝 r 칧 톩
k r e i틣 칧 a r
k 톖틣 칧
k v o u틣 칧 툺 r
h a l t a
h 톝틣 r a
k퉗 r o u n a
h a u틣 r a i틣
h a i h k 툺 r
h 톝틣 r
h o u틣 l 톝 l퍈
h 톖 r 칧 툺 r
h u틣 s
j o u틣 l
c퉗 톝 r퍈 c 톩 f 톝 r c a
k퉗 v a
k퉗 a틣 v
c퉗 톩 n틣 a
l e i틣 k a
l e i틣 k a틣 r 톩
l e i틣 r
l a 톢 칧 툺 r
l i틣 칧
l 톩 s t n i틣
l i틣 칧 톩
m a n a
m a n틣 톩
m 톝 칧 f 톝 r m 툺 n
m 톩 n틣 a
m 톩 n t p a n t
s t 톩 t l 툺 r
s p a i n s k a
s a틣 l a
s a m c퉗 a i n t
s a m f j 톝틣 l a틣 톢
s a틣 n a l l 톝틣 톢 a
s c 톩틣
s 톩 f j a
s k 톖틣 칧 a
s t l a u틣 t 툺 r
s 톖 f틣 i틣 j a
s t n a i틣 t 톩
s t a u틣 v a
s t l 톝 r t n
s t r a i틣 t a
s v 톩 l j 톩
s v a u틣 v 톩
s t r a u틣 k 툺 r
s i틣 r a
s o u h k
t퉗 톩 l c퉗 톩 n틣 i 콂 k
s p r e i틣 t a
t 톩 r퍈 t a r t
v a틣 칧 a
v 톝 r 칧 a
v 톝 r t
v 톝 r 칧 톩
v i틣 t
a u틣 r a
o u틣 t 톩
k a u 콂 k 툺 r
t퉗 i틣 t
i틣 s a
풪 톝틣 m a
풪 톝 s틣
풪 톩 r 칧 톩
풪 r i틣 r
